matcher_value: $p='C:\mnt\shared\'; $pt=Get-Partition | Where-Object { $_.AccessPaths -contains $p -or $_.AccessPaths -contains $p.TrimEnd('\') }; if($pt){ $v=$pt | Get-Volume; [pscustomobject]@{Device="Disk$($pt.DiskNumber)\Partition$($pt.PartitionNumber)"; MountedOn=$p.TrimEnd('\'); FileSystem=$v.FileSystem; Mode=$(if($pt.IsReadOnly){'ro'}else{'rw'}); Status=$pt.OperationalStatus; Health=$v.HealthStatus} | Format-List } else { "Mount point not found: $p" }
